views.title: Binder Workstation Home
views.purpose: Open the browser workstation with binder summary, current workflow state, and review shortcuts.

views.title: Workflow
views.purpose: Show active workflow, handoffs, current task, and progression state.

views.title: Review Center
views.purpose: Review contacts, notes, tasks, and message-derived records in a browser-first operator shell.

views.title: Publishing
views.purpose: Route compile-first publishing work into Wizard-managed render and publish flows.

views.title: Automation Status
views.purpose: Expose queue, diagnostics, and background-work visibility without moving scheduler ownership into Ubuntu.

views.title: Diagnostics
views.purpose: Expose package baseline, setup status, and sibling-service health.
